terms.s1p1: "Makanak" is an electronic platform that operates as a "digital intermediary" aimed at facilitating the display, search, and booking of properties available for rent within the Arab Republic of Egypt.
terms.s1p2: The platform's role is exclusively limited to connecting the two parties of the service: the Tenant (Client) and the Owner (Host).
terms.s1p3: Makanak disclaims responsibility for the ownership of the listed properties; it does not own or directly manage these properties, unless explicitly stated otherwise in the unit description.
terms.s2p1: Unit Selection: The tenant browses available properties and selects the suitable unit for the desired period.
terms.s2p2: Booking Confirmation (Deposit): A booking is not considered "confirmed" until the tenant pays the "booking deposit" electronically through the platform's approved payment gateways and receives an official confirmation message.
terms.s2p3: Data Exchange: Once payment is successfully confirmed, the platform automatically shares contact information between both parties (Tenant and Owner) to facilitate the handover process and complete the contract.
terms.s2p4: Remaining Balance Settlement: The tenant is obligated to pay the remaining agreed-upon rental value directly to the Owner (Host) upon inspection and receipt of the unit. The platform does not intervene in the collection of this remaining amount.
terms.s3p1: Commission Entitlement: Makanak does not charge any fees for mere listing or browsing. The platform earns its commission only upon successful completion of a booking.
terms.s3p2: Commission Value: The platform's commission is calculated as the full value of the "booking confirmation deposit" paid electronically by the tenant through the platform.
terms.s3p3: Commission & Cancellation: In case of a cancellation request, the commission (deposit) is subject to the refund rules outlined in "Section 4". The commission is considered the platform's right if the tenant is not eligible for a refund.
terms.s4intro: This policy has been established to ensure seriousness and preserve the time of owners and opportunities of other tenants. The following rules apply when a cancellation is requested:
terms.s4row1: 4 or more days before check-in: 100% of the deposit is refunded (only administrative payment gateway fees are deducted, if applicable).
terms.s4row2: 48 hours before arrival: Only 50% of the deposit value is refunded.
terms.s4row3: Less than 24 hours before arrival or no-show: The tenant is not entitled to any refund. The deposit is considered the right of the platform and the owner in exchange for reserving and blocking the unit.
terms.s5intro: The tenant is committed to general codes of conduct and applicable Egyptian laws, in addition to the following:
terms.s5p1: Data Accuracy: Commitment to providing accurate and up-to-date personal information upon registration or booking request. The tenant bears responsibility for any consequences resulting from incorrect data.
terms.s5p2: Occupancy Capacity: Strict adherence to the number of individuals specified and agreed upon in the booking details. The owner has the right to refuse additional individuals or charge extra fees for them.
terms.s5p3: Property Safety: Maintaining the safety of the property and all its contents including furniture and appliances. The tenant is legally and financially responsible for any damages resulting from negligence or misuse during the stay.
terms.s5p4: Schedule Compliance: Full commitment to the pre-determined Check-in and Check-out times to ensure no conflicts with other bookings and users' rights.
terms.s6intro: The owner is primarily responsible for the quality of the residential experience for the tenant and is committed to the following:
terms.s6p1: Compliance & Quality: Delivering the property on the specified date and in the technical and cleanliness condition agreed upon and shown in the listing photos and description on the platform.
terms.s6p2: Price Guarantee: Once the tenant pays the deposit and the booking is confirmed, the owner is committed to not changing the final price or requesting any additional amounts not mentioned in the booking details.
terms.s6p3: Booking Respect: Commitment to providing the booked unit throughout the agreed-upon stay period, and not canceling the booking or changing the unit except in cases of extreme necessity and after notifying the platform and tenant in advance.
terms.s7intro: The platform aims to build a trusted community based on transparency, therefore:
terms.s7p1: Rating Right: The tenant has the right to rate their experience with the other party after the end of the scheduled stay period, through the star rating and written comments system.
terms.s7p2: Review Integrity: The platform reserves the full right to review and delete any rating proven to be abusive, indecent, aimed at untrue defamation, or containing personal contact information.
terms.s7p3: Quality Improvement: These ratings are used as a primary criterion for ranking property listings and protecting future users from dealing with non-compliant parties.
terms.s8intro: Makanak operates as a technical platform for connecting and intermediation, and accordingly:
terms.s8p1: Side Financial Agreements: The platform is not at all responsible for any financial amounts paid or agreed upon outside of the "booking deposit" documented through the system.
terms.s8p2: Field Disputes: The platform bears no legal responsibility for material damages, injuries, or disputes that may arise between the owner and tenant after the unit handover and inspection stage.
terms.s8p3: Personal Belongings: The tenant is solely responsible for securing their personal belongings inside the unit. The platform is not obligated to compensate for any loss or theft that may occur during the stay.
terms.s9intro: To maintain the security and stability of the platform, the administration has the right to suspend or permanently ban any account without prior notice in the following cases:
terms.s9p1: Fraud: Proven execution of fraudulent payments or attempts to hack other accounts.
terms.s9p2: Identity Falsification: Submitting incorrect official documents or personal information upon registration.
terms.s9p3: Misuse: Using the platform for illegal purposes or activities contrary to public morals.
terms.s9p4: System Damage: Repeated cancellation of confirmed bookings without compelling reasons, causing financial harm to other parties and the platform's reputation.
terms.s10intro: Photos are the primary basis for the tenant's decision, therefore the Owner/Host is committed to providing completely honest content:
terms.s10p1: Photo Recency: Photos must be real, recent, and reflect the current state of the property and its surrounding facilities.
terms.s10p2: Technical Prohibitions: It is strictly prohibited to upload any of the following:
terms.s10p2a: Digital Rendering or conceptual designs without clarification.
terms.s10p2b: Photos edited with processing software (such as Photoshop) in a way that alters the unit's features or actual area.
terms.s10p2c: Photos impersonating other properties or taken from search engines and the internet.
terms.s11intro: Makanak has the full right to exercise its supervisory role to ensure content quality through:
terms.s11p1: Technical Review: Inspecting photos manually or through AI algorithms to detect duplicate or internet-sourced images.
terms.s11p2: Proof Media: The administration has the right to request a live explanatory video of the unit or ownership/management proof documents before activating the listing.
terms.s11p3: Precautionary Suspension: The platform has the right to temporarily suspend the display of any listing "under review" until its authenticity is verified, and permanently delete it if manipulation is proven.
terms.s12intro: In case of proven intentional misleading of users with fake photos, the "black points" system is applied to the account as follows:
terms.s12strike1a: An official warning is issued via email and inside the owner's control panel.
terms.s12strike1b: The violating listing is immediately deleted with notification to the owner to correct the content.
terms.s12strike2a: Temporary Suspension: All account activities are frozen for 7 business days.
terms.s12strike2b: Prohibition from publishing any new listings or receiving bookings during the penalty period.
terms.s12strike3a: Permanent Ban: The account is permanently closed and its holder is prevented from using the platform in the future.
terms.s12strike3b: Blacklist: Identity data and phone number are added to the internal watchlist to prevent creating alternative accounts for the same person.
terms.s13intro: In case the property is proven not to match the photos displayed on the platform in a way that leads to booking cancellation upon inspection, the following rules are applied immediately:
terms.s13p1: Tenant Protection: The full "booking deposit" amount is refunded to the tenant without any deductions, after verifying the validity of the misleading claim.
terms.s13p2: Owner Responsibility: The platform is committed to collecting the commission value from the Owner (Host) as compensation for misuse of the platform, and the platform has the right to deduct it from any current or future dues.
terms.s13p3: Additional Penalties: The owner is subject to the violations system (Strike System) and the violation may be classified as a "serious violation" leading to immediate ban, depending on the extent of discrepancy between the photos and reality.

privacy.title: 14. Data Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Makanak, we place the utmost importance on the privacy of your data, and we are committed to the following standards:
privacy.p1: Data We Collect: The data collected is limited to (name, phone number, email, and booking details), which are the data necessary for operating the service only.
privacy.p2: Data Protection: We use advanced electronic protection protocols and SSL encryption to ensure that no unauthorized party has access to user data.
privacy.p3: No Data Trading: We are fully committed to not selling, renting, or sharing user data with any third party for marketing or other purposes.
privacy.p4: Conditional Data Sharing: This is our golden rule; contact data between the owner and tenant is only shared after the successful completion of the deposit payment to ensure seriousness and privacy.
